WHATSECRET

Ciphers

  • Enigma
  • Shamir
  • RSA
  • Rabin
  • Stream

WHATSECRET is a cryptography tool used for processing and decoding messages encrypted with various ciphers.

Given ciphertext and appropriate parameters, the tool attempts to reconstruct the original plaintext.

The tools provided on this website are based on an open-source internal program Sabaton. An offline password-cracking and wordlist engine written in C, featuring an exhaustive keyspace generator and a simple hash-evaluation API supporting common algorithms. The project is designed for high throughput and operation in air-gapped or constrained environments and is currently a work in progress.

The source code used to operate this website and its tools is not publicly distributed unless explicitly stated otherwise. Any algorithms, scripts, or implementations used by the site remain part of its internal software and may not be copied, redistributed, or reused without permission.
